accommodations.text: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.
accommodations.source_quote: Use the personal FM/DM listening system in every class.

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a word bank for written-response items.

accommodations.text: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.

accommodations.text: Provide a copy of teacher notes.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a copy of teacher notes.

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.

accommodations.text: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide 25% extended time on timed assessments.

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.

goals.text: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.

goals.text: Aanya will write a five-sentence paragraph with a topic sentence and correct capitalization in 4 of 5 samples.
